Remember, it's okay to be simple! Keep going, you're doing great!

This helps organize your thoughts better and makes it easier to read. Keep up the good work!

Great job starting with a friendly greeting and introducing yourself! Your essay has a good start. Here are some suggestions to help organize your ideas better:

1. Start by telling Maria how nice it is to meet her.
2. Introduce yourself clearly.
3. Say that you want to talk about your family.

Your essay will flow better if you follow these steps. Keep up the good work!
feedback_oneshot:
Great job! You started with a friendly greeting and told Maria your name. Then you said how many people are in your family and where they live. It’s good to mention each family member by name next time. Here’s one suggestion to make it even clearer:

"Hello Maria,  
How are you? My name's Fabio. There are four people in my family: my parents and my sister. We all live in São Paulo, Brazil. My mother is fifty-six, my father is fifty-two, and my sister is thirty. Nice to meet you!"

This way, it’s easy for Maria to understand who everyone is. Keep up the good work!
